title: AiProfile
description: Reserved slot for per-faction or per-hero AI personality profiles. Empty-but-valid in MVP: only `id`, `schemaVersion`, and an optional `weights` map are defined. Populated by M3-or-later content work; references on faction.schema.json and hero.schema.json are optional.

weights.description: Optional per-Want-type weight overrides consumed by mvp.10-heuristic-ai.02-wants-engine. Keys are WantType identifiers; values are numeric multipliers.
